checks.detail: Response frontmatter exactly matches the active protocol, project, stage, handoff ID, and context hash.
The PDF, attachments overview, problem summary, and all three official Excel templates match the active manifest at import time.
The response correctly reflects the original PDF: missile direction to the fake target, 70–140 m/s UAV speed, 10 m smoke radius, 3 m/s descent, 20 s duration, and one bomb per UAV in Q4.
All five questions, their progression, inputs, outputs, hard constraints, assumptions, and data-analysis follow-up tasks are covered without selecting a solver or fabricating numerical results.
The response correctly states that the three Excel templates are already registered in the manifest, while reserving field-level inspection for data_analysis.
No platform-specific filecite or turn-file markers remain; the response names local sources directly.

next_action: Advance to data_analysis. Establish the parameter dictionary, inspect and register the result-template field structures, reproduce elementary kinematic quantities, and document unresolved modeling assumptions without selecting an optimization route.
